# merge(other:)

**Instance Method**

Merge another object of this type into this object.

## Declaration

```swift
mutating func merge(other: Self) throws -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **other**: The other object to merge into this one.

## Merging the parts

- **merge(partID:partDataURL:)**: Merges an individual part into the specified part of this object.
